target.title: Expose verified ClawHub source in skill verify output
target.body:
## Summary

Refs #92077. Follow-up to #93506.

This PR exposes the trusted ClawHub source provenance that #93506 started consuming in one more user-visible surface:

- Adds `openclaw.verifiedSourceUrl` to `openclaw skills verify` JSON output when ClawHub verification returns server-resolved GitHub provenance.
- Reuses the same trust-boundary helper for install persistence and verify output, so unsupported provenance shapes remain untrusted.
- Builds the promoted source URL from server-resolved `repo` + `commit` + optional `path`, producing a commit-pinned GitHub URL instead of trusting the raw `provenance.url` field, which can point at a mutable ref such as `main`.
- Documents the new verify JSON field in the skills CLI docs.

This does not read or promote self-attested `SKILL.md` metadata from #92860. It also does not replace #93314, which is still the readback half for provenance already written to local `.clawhub/origin.json`.

## Behavior addressed

Users and tooling consuming `openclaw skills verify` JSON can now find the verified source URL under the OpenClaw-owned metadata envelope without guessing whether raw ClawHub `provenance.url` is immutable or trusted.

Unavailable provenance or any non-`server-resolved-github-import` provenance stays only in the raw verification envelope and is not promoted as `openclaw.verifiedSourceUrl`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `openclaw skills verify` JSON now promotes only server-resolved ClawHub GitHub provenance into a commit-pinned `openclaw.verifiedSourceUrl`.

Conflict/merge proof after prepare:

- Rebased the narrow PR stack onto `origin/main` at `f50812dd56`.
- `git merge-tree $(git merge-base HEAD origin/main) origin/main HEAD` reports a clean merged result with no conflict records.
- Current PR diff is scoped to ClawHub verify output implementation, focused tests, and docs only: `docs/cli/skills.md`, `src/cli/skills-cli.ts`, `src/cli/skills-cli.verify.test.ts`, `src/cli/skills-cli.commands.test.ts`, `src/skills/lifecycle/clawhub.ts`, and `src/skills/lifecycle/clawhub.test.ts`.
- Local signature verification with the configured SSH signing public key reports all prepared commits as good signatures: `ad66207604 G`, `8a06d22861 G`, `c1059e3b9b G`, and `3e8e0bf34c G`.

Exact focused checks run after rebasing onto current `main`:

```sh
PNPM_CONFIG_MODULES_DIR=../../node_modules node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.cli.config.ts src/cli/skills-cli.verify.test.ts src/cli/skills-cli.commands.test.ts
PNPM_CONFIG_MODULES_DIR=../../node_modules node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-src.config.ts src/skills/lifecycle/clawhub.test.ts
node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check
git diff --check
```

Evidence after fix:

```text
CLI verify/command tests: 2 files passed, 52 tests passed
ClawHub lifecycle tests: 1 file passed, 42 tests passed
Prompt snapshots: current (7 files) after regenerating the 6 drifted Codex happy-path snapshots reported by CI
git diff --check: passed
Pinned commit validation: `openclaw.verifiedSourceUrl` now requires a full 40-hex ClawHub provenance commit; branch-like `main` and short hashes are covered as negative tests.
```

Observed result after fix:

- A verification response with `provenance.source: "server-resolved-github-import"`, `repo: "openclaw/skills"`, `commit: "def456"`, and `path: "agentreceipt"` produces `openclaw.verifiedSourceUrl: "https://github.com/openclaw/skills/tree/def456/agentreceipt"`.
- A verification response with unavailable or self-declared provenance does not produce `openclaw.verifiedSourceUrl`.
- Install persistence and verify output continue sharing the same helper, so only server-resolved provenance is promoted.

Live-sample limitation: there is still no live positive production ClawHub provenance sample available for this contract. The PR body records that limitation explicitly, and the focused CLI/lifecycle tests exercise the server-resolved provenance envelope that ClawHub returns for this feature.
target.author: momothemage
